dialogue_events.dialogue_text: They surely will never do for a long journey, Toto,
dialogue_events.source_excerpt: "They surely will never do for a long journey, Toto," she said. And Toto looked up into her face with his little black eyes and wagged his tail to show he knew what she meant.
